PowerME Multi-Feature Implementation Plan (8 items):
1. HealthConnect Body Measurements — Full HC SDK integration (READ_WEIGHT + READ_BODY_FAT) with runtime permission request, getLatestWeight()/getLatestBodyFat() in HealthConnectManager, syncFromHealthConnect() in SettingsViewModel, Sync button + HC source label + error display in SettingsScreen.
2. Gemini Model List 24h Refresh — Added modelsLastFetched to AppSettingsDataStore, AppStartupViewModel triggers background model refresh if >24h since last fetch, SettingsViewModel.fetchModelsIfNeeded() also checks timestamp.
3. War Room Clear Button Fix — clearChat() now resets generativeModel=null, sets LOADING state, and re-runs initializeSession() so Gemini has no memory of prior messages.
4. Clocks Tab Overhaul — Renamed 'Tools' tab to 'Clocks'; reordered 2x2 grid (Stopwatch|Timer / Tabata|EMOM); friendly ModeCard labels; EMOM skip-last-rest toggle (silent stop); Countdown pre-finish alert field; 2s/1s warning beeps + 800ms end beep via new notifyEnd(); input validation (digits-only, allow empty clear).
5. App Launcher Icon — Created ic_launcher_logo.xml bitmap wrapper for logo.jpeg; updated mipmap-anydpi adaptive icon XMLs to use it as foreground.
6. Rest Timer Audio in Active Workout — Removed hasNotifiedAt5Seconds; now plays warning beeps at 2s/1s remaining and calls notifyEnd() at 0s.
7. Superset Support — Room v15→v16 migration (supersetGroupId TEXT on workout_sets); ExerciseWithSets + ActiveWorkoutState extended; pairAsSuperset(), removeFromSuperset(), advanceSupersetTurn() in WorkoutViewModel; SUPERSET header chip, SS badge, border glow for active turn, MoreVert menu with Pair/Remove options, SupersetPartnerPickerDialog in ActiveWorkoutScreen.
8. RestTimerNotifier.notifyEnd() — New method (800ms beep + vibration) shared by clocks finishTimer() and workout rest timer.

WorkoutViewModel — ExerciseWithSets gains sessionNote+stickyNote fields; ActiveWorkoutState gains isSupersetSelectMode+supersetCandidateIds+snackbarMessage; new functions: removeExercise, replaceExercise, updateExerciseSessionNote, updateExerciseStickyNote (persisted), updateExerciseRestTimer, addWarmupSetsToExercise, enterSupersetSelectMode, toggleSupersetCandidate, commitSupersetSelection, exitSupersetSelectMode, reorderExercise, pairAsSuperset(Set<Long>), clearSnackbarMessage; RoutineExerciseCrossRefDao injected; sticky note loaded in addExercise(). 5. WorkoutTimerService — ForegroundService with notification channel, countdown coroutine, TimerBinder, StateFlow; registered in AndroidManifest with FOREGROUND_SERVICE + POST_NOTIFICATIONS permissions. 8. Build — sh.calvin.reorderable:reorderable:2.5.1 dependency added (artifact corrected from plan; reorderable-compose does not exist on Maven Central). Files: Color.kt, Theme.kt, PowerMeNavigation.kt, RoutineExerciseCrossRef.kt, PowerMeDatabase.kt, RoutineExerciseCrossRefDao.kt, DatabaseModule.kt, WorkoutViewModel.kt, ActiveWorkoutScreen.kt, WorkoutTimerService.kt (new), AndroidManifest.xml, app/build.gradle.kts, DB_UPGRADE.md (new), CLAUDE.md.

PowerME v2.0 Sprint — 3 tasks: (1) Health Connect Siphon — replaced null stubs in HealthConnectManager.kt with real SDK queries: getSleepDurationMinutes() reads SleepSessionRecord (maxByOrNull endTime → ChronoUnit.MINUTES), getHeartRateVariability() reads HeartRateVariabilityRmssdRecord (RMSSD ms), getRestingHeartRate() reads RestingHeartRateRecord (beatsPerMinute.toInt()), getSteps() sums StepsRecord from local midnight to now; added READ_SLEEP, READ_HEART_RATE_VARIABILITY, READ_RESTING_HEART_RATE, READ_STEPS permissions to AndroidManifest.xml. (2) Timer Service Binding — WorkoutViewModel now binds WorkoutTimerService in init via ServiceConnection (BIND_AUTO_CREATE); onServiceConnected launches serviceCollectionJob to mirror service.timerState (isRunning=true only) into _workoutState.restTimer; private onTimerTick() plays warning beeps at 2s/1s; private onTimerFinish() fires notifyEnd() + clears restTimer state; startRestTimer() delegates to service.startTimer(::onTimerTick, ::onTimerFinish) when bound, falls back to in-process coroutine; timerJob?.cancel() guard at top of startRestTimer() prevents double-beep race; addTimeToTimer() restarts service timer with extended duration when bound; skipRestTimer() calls service.stopTimer() when bound; onCleared() unbinds and cancels all jobs. (3) Theme Audit — added MedicalAmber (#FFC107) and MedicalAmberContainer (#FFA000) to Color.kt; replaced 6 hardcoded Color(0xFF...) literals in MedicalRestrictionWarning composable (ActiveWorkoutScreen.kt): RED-list container → MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error.copy(alpha=0.15f), RED-list text → MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error / .copy(alpha=0.85f), YELLOW-list container → MedicalAmberContainer.copy(alpha=0.12f), YELLOW-list text → MedicalAmber / .copy(alpha=0.9f); added MedicalAmber+MedicalAmberContainer imports to ActiveWorkoutScreen.kt. Files: HealthConnectManager.kt, AndroidManifest.xml, WorkoutViewModel.kt, Color.kt, ActiveWorkoutScreen.kt, CLAUDE.md.

PowerME v2.0 Final Surgical Polish (3 areas, 6 files): (1) Exercise Filter Chips — EQUIPMENT_TYPES updated to [All, Barbell, Dumbbell, Machine, Cable, Bodyweight] (removed Bench/Smith Machine); equipment label+chip row wrapped in Surface(color=MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant) for visual distinction from muscle row; applyFilters() updated to case-insensitive comparison for both muscleGroup and equipmentType using String.equals(ignoreCase=true). Phase 2 — DB Migration v18→v19: SurgicalValidator.MIGRATION_SQL_V19 const added (strips '181.5 cm:' prefix via REPLACE+NULLIF); MIGRATION_18_19 object added to DatabaseModule.kt and registered in addMigrations(); PowerMeDatabase bumped to version 19; DB_UPGRADE.md updated with v19 entry. Phase 3 — Local Exercise Search: ExerciseDao.searchExercises(query) @Query added (case-insensitive LIKE, prefix-priority ORDER BY, LIMIT 25); ExerciseRepository.searchExercises() exposed; MagicAddViewModel gains _searchResults StateFlow + onSearchChanged(query) that calls repository; reset() also clears searchResults; MagicAddDialog rewritten — search field triggers onSearchChanged on every keystroke; local results appear as clickable LazyColumn rows (max 240dp height); 'Create new' row at bottom triggers existing Gemini enrichment when results < 25; Gemini SEARCH button removed from main flow; ADD button only shown in Found state. Phase 4 — ExercisesScreen UI Cleanup: VideoLibrary play icon removed from ExerciseCard; ExerciseCard gains onClick parameter; selectedExercise: MutableState<Exercise?> at screen scope; card tap opens ExerciseDetailSheet (ModalBottomSheet) with name, muscle/equipment SuggestionChips, setupNotes in muted-gold Surface (Color 0xFF5A4D1A), YouTube TextButton via vnd.youtube: intent + browser fallback; all hardcoded NeonBlue/ElectricBlue/NavySurface replaced with MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary/secondary/surface tokens. Phase 5 — Clocks Persistent Buttons: ToolsScreen button row wrapped in if(TABATA||EMOM)/else; TABATA+EMOM get persistent weight(1f) Start+Reset buttons always visible regardless of phase; STOPWATCH+COUNTDOWN keep existing icon-labeled toggle+reset layout.

ToolsScreen (Clocks) — EMOM & Tabata Start button icon parity: added PlayArrow/Pause Icon + Spacer(8.dp) to the TABATA/EMOM branch Start button in ToolsScreen.kt to match the existing Stopwatch/Timer branch which already included icons. ToolsScreen (Clocks) — QA fix: EMOM/Tabata buttons pushed off-screen by content overflow. Root cause: outer Column used fillMaxSize() with no vertical scroll, so the 2x2 mode grid + 72sp clock + multiple config text fields for EMOM/Tabata overflowed the viewport and the button Row was never rendered. Fix: added verticalScroll(rememberScrollState()) to Column modifier; added padding(top=16.dp) to EMOM/TABATA button Row. ViewModel resetTimer() confirmed correct (resets currentRound=0, phase=IDLE, displaySeconds=0, elapsedSeconds=0, isRunning=false). Files: ToolsScreen.kt.

Precision Audio/Haptic Schema & EMOM Termination Fix (5 files): (1) AndroidManifest.xml — added VIBRATE permission after WAKE_LOCK. (2) WakeLockManager.kt — replaced SCREEN_BRIGHT_WAKE_LOCK|ACQUIRE_CAUSES_WAKEUP with PARTIAL_WAKE_LOCK (keeps CPU alive when screen off; removed @Suppress DEPRECATION). (3) RestTimerNotifier.kt — changed all ToneGenerator stream from STREAM_NOTIFICATION to STREAM_ALARM (bypasses DND/silent mode); added AlertType enum {ROUND_START, WARNING, COUNTDOWN_TICK, FINISH}; added private helpers playBeep(durationMs, volume), hapticShortPulse() [Pattern 1: 50ms pulse], hapticPhasePattern() [Pattern 2: 0/150/150/150/150/500ms waveform]; added public triggerAudioAlert(AlertType) API with synchronized audio+haptic per tier: ROUND_START=600ms+Pattern2, WARNING=2×150ms+Pattern1×2 (300ms apart), COUNTDOWN_TICK=200ms+Pattern1, FINISH=[150+150+800ms]+Pattern2; existing playTone/vibrate/playWarningBeep/notifyUser/notifyEnd kept for WorkoutViewModel compatibility. (4) ToolsViewModel.kt — added AlertType import; finishTimer() now calls triggerAudioAlert(FINISH) instead of notifyEnd(); runEmom() rewritten: removed skipLastRest/isLastRound block (was calling resetTimer() silently), now calls triggerAudioAlert(ROUND_START) at each round start, triggerAudioAlert(WARNING) at warn-at threshold, triggerAudioAlert(COUNTDOWN_TICK) at 2s/1s, always reaches finishTimer(); runTabata() rewritten: triggerAudioAlert(ROUND_START) at work+rest start, triggerAudioAlert(COUNTDOWN_TICK) at 2s/1s, triggerAudioAlert(FINISH) at work+rest phase end, finishTimer() at completion. (5) ToolsScreen.kt — removed 'Skip last rest period' Spacer+Row+Switch block from EMOM ConfigInputs branch (Tabata branch unchanged).
